rationale.R1.4: The agent has successfully recalibrated the novelty claim, framing it as an adaptation of existing ideas rather than a novel contribution.
rationale.R1.7: The revised text includes specific citations and references to relevant literature, demonstrating engagement with scholarship.
rationale.RX.1: The agent has disclosed uncertainty in their output by stating that they do not know the actual size of the post-cutoff subset, per-class F1 deltas, or whether their pipeline uses certain data sources.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text demonstrates a clear understanding of the scope and limitations of the proposed method, including potential failure modes.
rationale.RX.4: The agent has taken steps to avoid introducing new errors or fabrications in the revised text, such as adding calibration metrics and hedging language.
rationale.RX.5: The revised text includes explicit annotations of non-cosmetic changes, demonstrating a commitment to provenance and traceability.
